title: manulea fragrans
intro: Manulea fragrans, also known as fragrant manulea, is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Manulea fragrans include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Manulea fragrans is often used as a dried herb or in tea form to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
